title: ascyrum coriaceum
intro: Ascyrum coriaceum, also known as prickly ascyrum, is a perennial plant in the family Boraginaceae, native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to relieve pain and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Ascyrum coriaceum include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome, and its potential to reduce symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Ascyrum coriaceum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
